highlights.text: I wrote on Friday 4pm: “My general lean is ES can defend 6644 (or trap below and recover) which sets up 6655, consolidate, then 6670, 6688+.” We saw saw exactly this yesterday.
I wrote yesterday at 4pm: “My general lean is always to defer to the trend until supports fail.
On the chart, this “prints” as a Failed Breakdown, and its my core setup to trade it.
Typically, we see 1 to 2 Failed Breakdowns every single day of the week, and we saw exactly this last week (which kept us long the whole week - we have been long since September 5th continuously).

In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into a monster Failed Breakdown we had right after CPI last Thursday which gave us the nearly 100 point move up we saw into yesterday (this is key to know because we see this setup all the time).

post_title: FOMC Tomorrow. Expect Volatility. Can SPX Bulls Keep The Rally Going? Sept 17 Plan
